# Pull Request

## Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of what this PR does and why. -->

## Related Issue
<!-- Link the issue this PR closes, e.g. "Closes #12". -->
Closes #

## Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behaviour)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔧 Refactor / chore

## How Has This Been Tested?
<!-- Describe the tests you ran and how to reproduce. -->

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's style (`ruff check .` passes)
- [ ] I have run `ruff format .`
- [ ] I have added/updated tests where appropriate (`pytest` passes)
- [ ] I have updated the documentation where needed
- [ ] I have added an entry to `CHANGELOG.md` (Unreleased section)
- [ ] My changes do not introduce hard-coded secrets or unparameterised SQL
